title: Bloodory
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Bloodory''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]]. He worked at [[Medical Station Blue]] in the [[Underground Fortress]].

==Biography==
Bloodory was a slightly overweight middle-aged [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. He perfected a technique of extracting knowledge from the brains of doctors and scientists called [[Bloodory's distillation]]. He prepared distillations of the minds of 33 leading lights of Aquilae. The product was transported in vials on a [[shock belt]]. They were intended as payment to gain the support of the [[Chrome Companies]] on [[Ophuchi]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He, along with all the remaining staff of the fortress, was killed by [[nuclear bomb]]s launched from the Imperial [[Death Star/Legends|space fortress]].
